structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-03-20 HOPER Program Update
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-03-20 10:06:59-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

When the HOPER solar product was initially launched, NOVA implemented an overlay that excluded manufactured housing from the program. This overlay is now being removed, effective immediately. Please remember that all properties participating in the HOPER program must be inspected by the solar installation company. If the property is deemed unacceptable, we will not be able to proceed, and no exceptions can be made.

 

General Eligibility

*	FHA only
*	Purchase & Rate/Term refinances
*	1–4-unit properties
*	Must not already have solar
*	Property must be suitable for solar
*	Condos are ineligible

 

 

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
